chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-5268 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.22330/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 and 2 3. For order on Misc. No.22331/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.22332/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 04.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Hanif advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioner has sought quashment of FIR No.611 of 2025, registered under Section 489-F PPC at Police Station Sir Syed, Karachi Central. We find no reason for quashment of the aforesaid FIR. The petitioner shall join the inquiry and offer his full cooperation. The Investigating Officer of the aforesaid FIR shall carry out the investigation in respect of the aforesaid FIR fairly, impartially and strictly in accordance with law. A copy of this order shall be sent to the SSP Central, Karachi, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
